# Vendored Source

- Upstream repository: `https://github.com/NM512/r2dreamer`
- Vendored commit: `1fadce46c40dc59cf5a7407e4a296a3c6e4d1416`

Only compatibility changes are allowed in this directory:

- import/path fixes required to package the upstream code
- lightweight runtime compatibility adjustments for this repository

Algorithmic logic, losses, and default network structure should stay aligned
with upstream and be updated by re-vendoring from the pinned commit.
